meta.title: Gusaba igishushanyo mbonera cy'ubushobozi bwo kugera ku bantu

hero.title: Gusaba igishushanyo mbonera cy'ubushobozi bwo kugera ku bantu
hero.lead: IATF isuzuma ibyifuzo by'imishinga yo kugera ku bantu itangirira ku byo bakeneye koko.
support: Ntabwo ukeneye ibisobanuro birambuye. Ikibazo gisobanutse, uwo kigiraho ingaruka, n'impamvu ari ngombwa birahagije gutangira.

intro: Imihanda yose yinjira mu isuzuma rimwe.

items.label: Urubuga rwa interineti
items.body: Koresha fomu iri hasi kugira ngo utange icyifuzo cyateguwe.

items.label: Ibaruwa yo kuri interineti
items.body: Ohereza icyifuzo ku buryo butaziguye kuri {{contact.requestsEmail}}Ibyifuzo byoherejwe na e-mail bishobora kuba inyandiko z'ibyifuzo rusange nyuma yo gusuzumwa no gukosorwa.

items.label: Amakimbirane
items.body: Tangira aho niba aribyo byoroshye. Icyifuzo kiracyakomeza mu isuzuma rimwe.

guidance.title: Mbere yo kohereza icyifuzo
paragraphs: IATF ikora mu ruhame. Ibyifuzo birashobora gukusanywa no gutangarizwa nk'inyandiko zisaba abantu bose mu ishyirahamwe rya IATT GitHub, kururu rubuga, cyangwa byombi.

Ntugashyireho aderesi z'abantu ku giti cyabo, nomero za telefoni, amakuru ajyanye n'ubuvuzi, cyangwa amakuru agaragaza umuntu ku giti cye ukoresha ibikoresho by'ikoranabuhanga, keretse bibaye ngombwa kandi ukaba wemera ko IATF ibisuzuma.
IATF ikuraho amakuru y'abantu ku giti cyabo adakenewe mbere yo gutangaza inyandiko z'ibyifuzo.

review.title: Gusuzuma ibyari byitezwe
paragraphs: Gutanga icyifuzo ntibitanga igihamya cy'uko icyo cyifuzo cyemewe.
IATF isuzuma ibyifuzo bijyanye n'inshingano, ibisabwa, akamaro, n'uko igikorwa cyaba kiri mu bubiko rusange.
Ibyifuzo bimwe bishobora kwanga, gusubikwa, cyangwa guhindurwa mbere yo kwemerwa.

fields.name: Amakuru y'ibanze
fields.label: Ibirebana no gushyikirana na bo
fields.helper: Aderesi imeyiri cyangwa aderesi ya Discord yo gukurikirana.
fields.placeholder: Aderesi imeyiri cyangwa aderesi ya Discord

fields.name: ikibazo
fields.label: Ni ikihe kibazo urimo ugerageza gukemura?
fields.helper: Sobanura icyo kibazo mu magambo yoroheje.

fields.name: extraAho byavuye
fields.label: Ibisobanuro by'inyongera
fields.helper: Sangiza ikindi kintu cyose cyafasha gusobanura ibikenewe: impamvu ari ngombwa, ingero, ubuvugizi, igitekerezo cya porogaramu mbi, cyangwa imipaka y'igihe.

fields.name: openSourceConsent (Inyandiko y'umwimerere)
fields.label: Mbese, wumva wisanzuye mu iterambere ry'ikoranabuhanga rikoreshwa n'abantu bose?
fields.helper: Imishinga yemewe ni ububiko rusange munsi ya IATF.

items: ububiko rusange mu ishyirahamwe rya IATF GitHub
uruhushya rwa copyleft kuri code n'ibikoresho by'umushinga
inyandiko y'ibaruramari ku rubuga rwa IATF

header.title: Gusaba mu magambo make kandi asobanutse bihagije kugira ngo utangire

paragraphs: Niba ufite ibyo ukeneye by'ukuri kandi ukaba utekereza ko bikwiye kuba umushinga rusange, uzitwoherereze.
